{{Infobox artifact
| name = Wavedancer
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Wavedancer Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wavedancer is a masterfully crafted [[flying sword]] that possesses an [[Archlord]]-level spirit. Designed to protect its owner by channeling the immense strength and speed of an ocean storm, the weapon is notable for having no [[binding]], which allows it to be utilized even by an [[Underlord]]. The [[sword]] features a broad, blue-tinged physical form and is highly responsive to the user's will. In combat, it can be controlled remotely via [[madra]] or used physically as a handheld blade. Its capabilities include the ability to create multiple clones through [[Forged madra]], forming specialized combat arrays such as the Weeping Dragon Sword Formation. While it functions best in environments with rich [[aura]], it can still be deployed in thinner atmospheres, though its flight may become sluggish. The weapon has been used to pierce powerful entities, deflect high-level techniques, and unleash devastating bursts of blue-and-gold storm power.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Wavedancer is a flying double-edged blade featuring runes stylized to resemble crashing waves. The weapon possesses a graceful [[Archlord]] spirit that remains without any [[binding]]. During combat, [[Lindon]] utilizes the [[sword]] to block incoming attacks, effectively using it as a shield. In one instance, [[Dross]] even moves the flying blade to intercept a punch.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wavedancer]] is a double-edged blade with runes stylized to look like crashing waves.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wavedancer]]'s [[Archlord]] spirit is graceful and it has no [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] moves the flying [[Wavedancer]] to block a punch.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wavedancer]] is a weapon that sits next to [[Lindon]] when he wakes up.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wavedancer]] is [[Lindon]]'s [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Wavedancer]] to block attacks.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wavedancer]] is a [[sword]] that can act as a shield.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wavedancer]] is a [[flying sword]] crafted from the blues and greens of wind and waves.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wavedancer]] is an [[Archlord]] [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wavedancer]] is a [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wavedancer]] is used to carve a [[binding]] like a smooth pearl.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wavedancer]] follows [[Lindon]] but is sluggish in the current [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] summoned [[Wavedancer]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Originally won by [[Lindon]] as a prize during the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, Wavedancer is an entity or artifact characterized by storm [[madra]] and crackling blue-and-gold power. During combat, it is capable of unleashing the breath of a golden [[dragon]] and creating eight distinct clones. The entity also demonstrated its offensive capabilities by spearing into the [[Titan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] speared into the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] was [[Lindon]]'s prize from the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] holds crackling blue-and-gold power and storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] can create eight clones.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] is an entity or artifact that unleashes a golden [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wavedancer]] appeared over [[Lindon]]'s head as a [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
